text:
The air is filled with the sterile yet inviting scent of technology and quiet ambition. The first scene feels anticipatory, as if something important is about to start in this glass-walled, modern meeting room. Here, boundaries fade, and even the emergency equipment on the wall takes on a symbolic weight—preparedness in the face of intellectual exploration.

Stepping into the second scene, vibrant colors and bold text stimulate my mind. I am enveloped by curiosity and wonder, inspired by the promise of research and development. Here, words and machines meet, and I feel a kind of reverent excitement—an anticipation that ideas will soon come to life before my very eyes. There is an underlying optimism—a sense that in such a place, the future is always beginning.
